sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102622" key="tau)to/logos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ταὐτόλογ-ος</orth> (parox.), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n102622.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">repeating what has been said, tautologous,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.206</biblScope> </bibl> (Eupith.).</sense> </entryFree>
